data.name: Hentai Kai
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Kai – 一款神秘而誘惑人的拼圖遊戲，讓你沉浸在海盜、危險與禁忌享樂的世界中。遊戲採用獨特的黑白藝術風格，將你帶回那個海盜統治海洋、傳奇在燭光低語中誕生的時代。

主角是 Kai，一位勇敢又迷人的女海盜。她穿越風暴，尋找寶藏，並與命運展開致命的博弈。解開謎題的過程中，你將逐步揭開她的生活片段，場景也會變得越來越大膽且令人沉醉。

✨ 遊戲特色：

🔥 30 個關卡

🏆 30 項成就

🎨 畫廊模式

⭐️ 三種難度模式：

☁️ 簡單 — 適合新手和喜歡輕鬆體驗的玩家。

⚔️ 中等 — 適合熱愛解謎的玩家，提供平衡的挑戰。

💀 困難 — 專為拼圖大師打造，每個細節都至關重要。

隨著你的進度推進，這場危險冒險的誘惑一面也將逐漸展現。你能拼湊出她的完整故事，沉浸在這個充滿激情與暗影的世界中嗎？

data.short_description: 與勇敢的女海盜凱一起踏上激動人心的旅程！⚓ 這款成人益智遊戲將帶你沉浸在海上冒險、寶藏和神秘世界中。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 波蘭文*, 俄文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Kai
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Kai is a mysterious and seductive puzzle game that immerses you in a world of piracy, danger, and forbidden pleasures. The game is crafted in an atmospheric black-and-white style, transporting you to an era when sea rogues ruled the waves, and legends were whispered by candlelight.

The main heroine is Kai, a bold and alluring pirate. She braves storms, hunts for treasures, and plays deadly games with fate. As you solve puzzles, you will gradually unlock scenes from her life—each one becoming more revealing and captivating.

✨Game Features:

🔥 30 levels – uncover the secrets of Kai’s journey!
🏆 30 achievements – prove your mastery and unlock all rewards!
🎨 Gallery – revisit every unlocked moment in stunning detail!
⭐️Three Difficulty Levels:

    ☁️ Easy – perfect for beginners and those who want to enjoy the game at a relaxed pace.
    ⚔️ Moderate – a balanced challenge for puzzle lovers seeking the perfect mix of difficulty and enjoyment.
    💀 Hard – a true test for puzzle masters where every piece matters.

The deeper you go, the more vividly the seductive side of this dangerous adventure unfolds. Can you piece together every fragment of her story and dive into a sensual world of shadows and passion?

data.short_description: Embark on an exciting journey with the brave pirate Kai! ⚓ This adult puzzle game will plunge you into a world of sea adventures, treasures, and mysteries.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*, Polish*, Russian*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

  • Processor: 2 GHz

  • Storage: 500 MB available space
